assertions.text: Produces Instagram 1:1 (1080x1080) / 4:5 (1080x1350) / story 9:16, card-news series, or posters as requested.
Enforces AI-slop prevention (max 3 monotone colors, no Inter, no over-decoration) in the prompt.

cases.prompt: Make a marketing poster using our brand colors and logo

assertions.text: Injects brand tokens (color/font/logo) to keep consistency when they are available.
If no brand tokens exist, recommends running /design-consultation first.
